name: Anxiety/stress/sleep
safetyNote: May cause sedation or interact with alcohol, antidepressants, sedatives, or anxiety medicines.

name: Appetite/fiber
safetyNote: Take with plenty of water; separate from medicines/supplements by 2+ hours due to absorption effects.

name: Blood pressure/heart
safetyNote: May interact with blood pressure, blood thinner, heart, or diuretic medications.

name: Blood sugar/diabetes support
safetyNote: May lower blood sugar; monitor closely if using insulin or diabetes medications.

name: Brain/focus
safetyNote: May interact with blood thinners, stimulants, sedatives, or psychiatric medications.

name: Energy/fatigue/adaptogen
safetyNote: May be stimulating; use caution with insomnia, anxiety, hypertension, or stimulant medicines.

name: Gut cleansing/digestion
safetyNote: Laxative or antimicrobial herbs may cause cramping or interactions; avoid long-term use without professional guidance.

name: Headaches
safetyNote: Migraine support is individualized; check interactions with blood thinners, sedatives, and liver-affecting medicines.

name: Immune/cancer-support research
safetyNote: Supportive education only; do not replace oncology care; ask an oncologist about interactions.

name: Inflammation/joints
safetyNote: May interact with blood thinners, NSAIDs, surgery, or stomach-ulcer conditions.

name: Kidney/urinary
safetyNote: Avoid with kidney disease, pregnancy, or diuretic/lithium medicines unless supervised.

name: Men/libido/ED
safetyNote: May interact with blood pressure, heart, prostate, or ED medications; avoid yohimbe without clinician guidance.

name: Weight loss/metabolic
safetyNote: Use caution with stimulants, thyroid issues, pregnancy, heart rhythm concerns, and blood-pressure or diabetes medicines.

name: Women/PCOS/hormone
safetyNote: May affect hormones; avoid in pregnancy, fertility treatment, hormone-sensitive conditions unless supervised.
